hero.description: AI trading bot that watches social media, makes trade recommendations 24/7, and lets you approve them from your phone.

features.title: Your AI Trading Agent
features.subtitle: Institutional-grade infrastructure for retail algorithmic traders

ai.title: AI Analysis
ai.description: LLM-powered trade recommendations using OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or DeepSeek.

multiasset.title: Multi-Asset
multiasset.description: Trade stocks, crypto (24/7), and options with delta targeting strategies.

signals.title: Signal Aggregation
signals.description: Monitors StockTwits, Reddit, Twitter, and SEC filings for sentiment and momentum.

telegram.title: Telegram Approvals
telegram.description: Approve or reject trades from your phone via Telegram, or enable autonomous mode.

risk.title: Risk Guardrails
risk.description: Kill switches, position limits, daily loss caps, and staleness detection built in.

journal.title: Trade Journal
journal.description: Track outcomes for learning and pattern extraction across all your trades.

byok.title: Bring Your Own Keys
byok.description: Use your own broker (Alpaca) and LLM API keys. Your capital, your control.

templates.title: Strategy Templates
templates.description: Shareable templates for custom prompt engineering approaches. Publish and fork strategies.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about notdemo.trade

beginner.label: Beginners
beginner.a1: It's a platform that runs an AI trading assistant for you. Think of it like having a robot that watches the market 24/7, suggests trades based on social media buzz and technical analysis, and can execute them with your approval or automatically.

trader.label: Experienced Traders
trader.description: For traders familiar with TA and systematic trading.
trader.q1: I already do my own TA. Why would I need this?
trader.a1:
Three reasons:
1. **24/7 monitoring**: You can't watch 50 stocks across multiple timeframes constantly. The agent does.
2. **Signal aggregation**: Combines social sentiment (often leading indicator) with your TA in real-time. Catches momentum before it shows up on charts.
3. **Systematic execution**: Removes emotional trading. Your rules + AI analysis + automatic execution = discipline.

Think of it as your trading strategy, systematized and scaled.

developer.label: Developers
developer.description: Technical deep-dive into architecture and stack.
developer.a1:
**Three-tier edge-native stack**:

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  User Application (TanStack Start SSR)                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ React + TanStack Router                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Server functions (createServerFn)                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Deployed: Cloudflare Workers                        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          вҶ“ HTTP/WebSocket
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Data Service (Hono REST API)                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Handlers вҶ’ Services вҶ’ Queries pattern               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Zod validation, error handling                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Deployed: Cloudflare Workers                        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          вҶ“ RPC/WebSocket
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Trading Agent (Cloudflare Agents SDK)                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Durable Object per user                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Scheduled loops (signal gathering, analysis)        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ WebSocket for real-time state sync                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ SQLite for per-agent logs + config                  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          вҶ“
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Data Layer (data-ops package)                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Drizzle ORM вҶ’ Neon Postgres                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Zod schemas for validation                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Type-safe queries + Better Auth integration         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Shared across all services                          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Key characteristics**:
- **Edge-first**: Everything runs on Cloudflare's edge network (low latency globally)
- **Monorepo**: Shared types and logic across frontend/backend/agents
- **Serverless**: No VMs to manage, infinite scaling
- **Multi-tenant**: Per-user isolation via Durable Objects
